scripts.build: pnpm run migrate:prod && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" next build
scripts.deploy: pnpm run deploy:database && pnpm run deploy:app
scripts.deploy:database: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SECRET=ignore CLOUDFLARE_ENV=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV payload migrate && wrangler d1 execute D1 --command 'PRAGMA optimize' --env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV --remote
scripts.devsafe: rm -rf .next && rm -rf .open-next && cross-env CLOUDFLARE_ENV=local NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next dev
scripts.generate:types: pnpm run generate:types:cloudflare && pnpm run generate:types:payload
scripts.migration:import:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SECRET=ignore CLOUDFLARE_ENV=dev NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation tsx scripts/migration/import-new.ts
scripts.migration:import:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SECRET=ignore CLOUDFLARE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation tsx scripts/migration/import-new.ts
scripts.migration:import:live: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SECRET=ignore CLOUDFLARE_ENV=live NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation tsx scripts/migration/import-new.ts

PAYLOAD_SECRET.description: Generate a random string using `openssl rand -hex 32`
